title: Tako? Takou? TACO-ru? Decoding the Trump TACO meme around the world.
summary_full: A Washington Post reporter’s doctor in Seoul had a question — how to translate “chicken out,” as in “Trump always chickens out,” into Korean?
summary_public: A Washington Post reporter’s doctor in Seoul had a question — how to translate “chicken out,” as in “Trump always chickens out,” into Korean?
